name: milvus
description: 12 skills for creating, optimising, managing, debugging, and operating Milvus vector databases. Supports Standard Milvus, IBM Cloud (watsonx.data), and Zilliz Cloud.

milvus_uri.title: Milvus URI
milvus_uri.description: Connection URI for your Milvus instance (e.g. http://localhost:19530 or https://host:19530)

milvus_token.title: Milvus Token
milvus_token.description: Auth token (username:password for self-hosted, API key for cloud). Leave empty for no-auth dev deployments.

deployment_profile.title: Deployment profile
deployment_profile.description: One of: standard (open-source Milvus Lite/Standalone/Distributed), ibm_cloud (watsonx.data), zilliz_cloud, or custom
